enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his day in Boulder on October 17, 2016, dealing with slow internet and a tech visit to fix it. He mentions plans to see friends, do a circuit class, and discusses upcoming travel goals involving visiting places around the world.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: frustrated but managing while waiting for the tech to fix it
excited to visit and document notable places around the world
